UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR TRO AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 23, 2013 PER REQUEST OF THE PARTIES. TRO IS TO REMAIN IN EFFECT. Order To Show Cause For Tro And Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Order To Show Cause For Tro And Preliminary Injunction is Continued to December 23, 2013 per request of the parties. TRO is to remain in effect. Defendant may file a further declaration and status report on December 16, 2013 and serve it by e-mail.
